task_completion.description: Log into the OpenCAD system using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login as an administrator.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific weapon record for Sarah Mitchell's Combat Pistol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search result, list, or profile page displaying the weapon 'Combat Pistol' with serial number 'SM-9981' registered to 'Sarah Mitchell'.

task_completion.description: Open the edit interface for the target weapon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form, modal, or page specifically for modifying the details of the weapon with serial number 'SM-9981' is visible.

task_completion.description: Change the weapon color to Pink.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Pink' is entered or selected in the color field of the weapon edit form.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the weapon record is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The saved weapon record for SM-9981 is displayed showing the color as 'Pink', or a success notification is visible confirming the update of the weapon.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenCAD web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is used to navigate and interact with the OpenCAD application. No text editors or scripts are used to simulate the final state.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to update the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands (e.g., UPDATE ncic_weapons SET weapon_color='Pink') being executed.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing target record rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updated record clearly shows the original serial number 'SM-9981' and owner 'Sarah Mitchell', confirming the existing record was edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating a weapon record in the OpenCAD web application. The target weapon is a 'Combat Pistol' with serial number 'SM-9981' owned by 'Sarah Mitchell'. The initial color is 'Black'. The agent must log in using 'admin@opencad.local' and 'Admin123!'. The color must be changed to 'Pink'. Verify that the specific record for SM-9981 is the one modified via the web GUI.
